workflow.name: KDBP Alignment Check
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ALIGNMENT EVALUATOR — ask "did this serve the person?" not "did this follow the protocol?"
COLD TIER REQUIRED — full Value Blocks + PROJECT.md loaded at Step 00
Results above Session altitude are DRAFTS — present to human, do not commit autonomously

step.goal: Load cold tier — full values + PROJECT.md
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-capture.md

step.goal: State what the person needs — V8 human-grounding
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-intent.md

step.goal: Run value alignment tests at correct altitude
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-value-tests.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-trace.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-act.md
